oneLiner: A native macOS terminal emulator (SwiftUI + embedded Ghostty) with a workspace model and CLI built for driving Claude Code sessions.
now: `claude --worktree` engine for new spaces: a global setting routes the new-space "Create worktree" checkbox to `claude --worktree` (Claude auto-names; tian detects the result via `git worktree list` and binds the space + branch). Implemented + live-verified; PR #46 open.
next: Drive down orchestrator resident-context / output inversions (ADR 0003) using session-audit on real /tian implement runs.

milestones.title: Agent delegation (/tian implement) shipped in a release

shipped.summary: Hardened the /tian implement orchestrator↔implementer harness (90-min ceiling; busy-at-ceiling = `running`, not a failure; child commits its own work + emits a done signal) and added a versioned run log (workflow_version 1.0.1) + the session-audit skill. Validated by a live smoke test.

Sidebar shows the orchestrator → implementer hierarchy: worktree Spaces nest under the Space that spawned them (two-level cap, same-workspace), tied by a continuous connector rail with a house (⌂) marker.
Released v0.15.0 (notarized): ships `tian worktree remove --delete-branch` and the /tian implement plan-submission fix + self-verify coda.
